title: Rocco Forte Hotels: Bringing Consistency, Speed, and Hiring Manager Ownership to Luxury Hospitality
text: Rocco Forte Hotels modernised enterprise recruitment and reduced hiring time with Teamtailor. A luxury hospitality group operating across multiple countries, they needed consistency across locations and better hiring manager engagement. Teamtailor helped them standardize their recruitment process, improve speed to hire, and give hiring managers more ownership of the process.

title: Lotus: Accelerating Time-to-Hire with Smarter Recruiting and Clearer Insights
text: Lotus cut time-to-hire from 55 to 23 days and improved hiring quality with Teamtailor's automation, analytics, and interview tools. The automotive company used Teamtailor to gain clearer insights into their recruitment funnel and automate manual steps that were slowing down their hiring process.

title: How Dacha Real Estate scaled recruitment without losing the human touch
text: Dacha Real Estate modernised recruitment with Teamtailor, boosting efficiency, elevating candidate experience and strengthening their employer brand. As a growing real estate company, they needed to scale hiring while maintaining a personal touch with candidates.

title: How Movember balances empathy and efficiency with AI-powered hiring
text: Movember modernized its recruitment with Teamtailor's ATS, streamlining global hiring, automating workflows, and delivering a 99% candidate satisfaction rate. The non-profit used Teamtailor to manage hiring across multiple countries while maintaining their people-first culture.

title: Hoxhunt saved nearly €10,000 and built a more human candidate experience
text: Hoxhunt, a fast-growing cybersecurity company, saved nearly €10,000 in recruitment costs and built a more human candidate experience using Teamtailor. They used career page customization, automation, and candidate nurturing to attract top tech talent.

title: Improving hiring manager engagement with Wego
text: Wego used Teamtailor to better manage their time and improve internal communication and processes. A travel technology company, they struggled with hiring managers not being engaged in the recruitment process. Teamtailor's triggers and notifications solved this by keeping managers accountable and informed.

title: How Scandinavian Executive improved communication with candidates using Teamtailor
text: Scandinavian Executive, a recruitment and executive search firm, used Teamtailor to communicate better with candidates and save time in the hiring process. They improved their candidate pipeline management and automated routine communications.

title: How Giacom reduce hiring time and improve ROI using Teamtailor
text: Giacom used Teamtailor to screen candidates, save time on recruitment and create transparency within the recruitment process. The technology and cloud services company improved their hiring ROI by using structured interview kits and candidate screening automation.

title: Eliminating manual hiring processes with GoodOaks Homecare
text: GoodOaks Homecare reduced time-to-hire and lengthy manual tasks and improved their overall recruitment process with Teamtailor. As a homecare provider hiring large volumes of care workers, they needed to automate manual paperwork and speed up their onboarding process.

title: How Hamilton Bright Group Transformed its Recruitment with Teamtailor
text: Hamilton Bright Group used Teamtailor to streamline and optimize their hiring process across multiple locations. A field marketing and sales agency hiring large volumes of staff across Europe, they used Teamtailor to standardize recruitment and gain better visibility across their hiring pipeline.

title: Increasing application conversion rates and hiring manager engagement at Tangle Teezer
text: Tangle Teezer revamped their entire candidate journey using Teamtailor's recruitment metrics, improving application conversion rates and hiring manager engagement. The consumer goods brand used career page optimization and structured hiring workflows to attract and convert more applicants.

title: MacLean Fogg: Moving from Dayforce ATS to Teamtailor for Manufacturing Recruitment
text: MacLean Fogg, a manufacturing company, moved from Dayforce's ATS to Teamtailor. They needed a more modern, user-friendly ATS that could handle high-volume hourly and skilled worker recruiting across multiple manufacturing plants. Teamtailor's career pages and automation tools helped them attract more applicants and move candidates through the pipeline faster.

title: How Oatly uses Teamtailor for global recruitment
text: Oatly, the global food and beverage brand, uses Teamtailor for recruitment across multiple countries. They leverage Teamtailor's multi-language career pages and global job posting capabilities to attract talent worldwide while maintaining their distinctive brand identity.

title: Championing diversity with Precis
text: Precis earned the title of Diversity Champions in March 2025 for their commitment to fair, inclusive hiring practices using Teamtailor. The digital marketing agency used Teamtailor's anonymized recruitment features and structured interview kits to reduce bias and improve diversity in their hiring.

title: USG: Large-scale manufacturing recruitment with Teamtailor
text: USG, a manufacturing agency with 5,000+ employees, uses Teamtailor to manage high-volume recruitment across multiple locations. They use Teamtailor's automation, triggers, and reporting to keep their large recruiting team aligned and efficient.
